name: Curried Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Basmati rice, white or brown
1/8 teaspoon Ground cardamom (or seeds of cardamom pods, crushed)
1 cup Green peas, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the rice in a large skillet over medium heat until it starts to become opaque and somewhat chalky in appearance.
2. Add remaining ingredients, except peas, and bring to a simmer.
3. Cover the pot and cook until rice is tender and all the water is absorbed (20 minutes for white rice, 60 minutes for brown rice).
4. Stir in the peas just before serving (a few minutes sooner if using fresh peas).
5. Serves 6-8.
